video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. 林澈推开公寓门，雨水从外套滴落, 厨房灯突然亮起，林澈愣住, 林澈环顾空荡荡的厨房，表情困惑. Narration: "午夜的雨把旧公寓包成一只黑盒。林澈回家时，厨房灯自己亮着。". 林澈 says: "我出门前，明明关了灯。". Camera motion: static wide establishing shot, slow dolly in from medium to close-up. Night, rain outside window, dim kitchen interior, single overhead light on, young man in wet coat standing in doorway, surprised expression, cinematic lighting, moody atmosphere, film grain. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

workflow.tool_instructions: Use video prompt + conditioning keyframes for img2vid generation. Copy 'video_prompt' into your video tool, attach 'conditioning_keyframes' as start/end frame conditioning.
